'''Cambira Ralle''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] who was a decorated veteran of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He later became [[President/Legends|President]] of the [[Esselian Hall]] and a member of the anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Forad Party]]. Opposition to his leadership of parliament increased after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and an [[Galactic economy|economic]] downturn, as well as military intervention by Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Griff Takel]].
